name: ForgeWright MCP
description: ForgeWright + ForgeNexus MCP Configuration for Antigravity

forgewright-workspace.description: ForgeWright project intelligence with workspace isolation

notes.installation: Run 'fw-mcp.sh setup' from your project to auto-generate this config

notes.multi_project: One config works for ALL projects with Antigravity
